msg: Project tone created. First revenue-targeted app: Android frequency generator. Goal: Play Store launch, non-intrusive ads, optional paid tier to remove ads.

Spawned Tech Specialist to produce full architecture spec: audio generation approach, waveform/noise synthesis algorithms, Play Billing library selection, AdMob integration, app architecture, and full dependency list.

Tech Specialist complete. Audio engine: react-native-audio-api. IAP: react-native-purchases (RevenueCat). AdMob: react-native-google-mobile-ads. Full dependency list and architecture spec produced. Developer can implement directly.

Spawned Developer to build full Tone Generator app: Expo scaffold, react-native-audio-api audio engine, waveform+noise synthesis, AdMob banner, RevenueCat IAP, expo prebuild. Package: app.hivefoundry.tone.

First Developer spawn (tone-app-build-20260603-000001) ran out of context after only scaffolding. Re-spawned as tone-app-build-20260603-000002 with phased prompt covering config, deps, constants, audio utils, full screen implementation, and expo prebuild.
Spawned Developer (attempt 2) to implement full Tone Generator app from existing scaffold.

Developer complete. Full app built: config, deps, audio engine, noise synthesis, AdMob, RevenueCat, expo prebuild succeeded. Mind fixed REVENUECAT env var prefix (EXPO_PUBLIC_ required for runtime bundle access). expo-system-ui installed post-hoc.
